patches.find: the BOU 2017 baseline is roughly 3.6× the falsification half-width (|−0.9| / 3 ≍ 3.6), well outside the dome’s own ±3 nT acceptance window
patches.replace: the BOU 2017 baseline of −10.9 nT is approximately 10.8 nT above the ±3 nT ceiling (i.e., roughly 3.6× the threshold: 10.9 / 3 ≈3.6), well outside the dome’s own ±3 nT acceptance window
patches.rationale: ISS-1651: Previous phrasing ambiguous (3.6x the threshold, or 3.6x the full ±6 nT interval?). New phrasing gives explicit arithmetic: 10.8 nT above the ceiling = 3.6x the 3 nT half-width.
WIN-044 c5 H1: Dome formula publishes ΔZ (vertical component), not ΔB (total field). Correct the citation to match dome publication.
